title: stachys trinervis
intro: Stachys trinervis, also known as upright hedgenettle or sticky hedge nettle, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, Stachys trinervis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
